title: Combo Sword
description: This mod adds a sword that has 2 points of attack speed instead 1,6, which is big difference. If in second hand gives haste 2
body:
## **This mod doesn't need another mod to work**

* This mod adds "Combo Sword" which is a sword that has an attack speed of 2 (instead of 1.6 as in a regular sword)

* When held in the other hand, it gives a haste effect 2 if needed (see changelog)

* Can be crafted with: Diamond Hoe, Nether Star and Blaze Rod

* If you want to include this mod in your public modpack, feel free



### You can send your ideas about this mod on [Discord](https://discord.gg/xhQTg6aDEa)

### [CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/combo-sword) Website (only forge version)


FAQ:
---
1. When next update?
* In new version of MCreator, plugin that allows make fabric mods have problems with procedures, so no update for now
---
